infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Motogram needs location to show nearby riders and your rides.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Motogram uses background location during live group rides so your group can see your position.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Motogram needs camera access for posts and stories.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Motogram needs photo library access to upload posts and stories.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Motogram needs microphone access for videos and voice notes.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Motogram uses your location to show nearby riders and share your position during live rides.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Allow background location during live rides.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Show nearby riders on the map.
